dashboard.label: Deployment Server Health Dashboard
dashboard.description: Comprehensive monitoring for Splunk Deployment Server operations

search.query: | rest /services/deployment/server/clients | stats count by machineType | sort -count
| rest /services/deployment/server/clients | eval last_checkin=strptime(lastPhoneHomeTime, "%a %b %d %H:%M:%S %Y") | where last_checkin < relative_time(now(), "-24h") | stats count as stale_clients
index=_internal source=*metrics.log group=tcpin_connections | timechart span=1h dc(hostname) as connected_clients

| rest /services/deployment/server/applications | table title, serverclasses, clientCount, lastUpdated | rename title as "App Name", serverclasses as "Server Classes", clientCount as "Client Count", lastUpdated as "Last Updated" | sort -"Client Count"

| rest /services/deployment/server/serverclasses | table title, filterType, clientCount | rename title as "Server Class", filterType as "Filter Type", clientCount as "Client Count" | sort -"Client Count"
